headline: EXCLUSIVE: Ginger, Shoutem Partner To Offer Direct-To-Consumer Apps To Cannabis Retailers
summary:
Ginger [Commerce], a California pure-play, direct-to-consumer platform, launched an exclusive partnership with Shoutem, Benzinga has learned exclusively.

Ginger and Shoutem are now creating iOS native, white-labeled mobile apps exclusively for Ginger’s customer brands.

headline: Latest On Russia-Ukraine War: Paypal Suspends Service In Russia; Ceasefire Violated
summary: PayPal Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: PYPL) on Saturday announced that it is halting its operations in Russia, joining a growing number of companies responding to the Ukrainian invasion.

headline: EV Week In Review: Tesla Giga Berlin Update, Rivian Crashes On Price Hike Gaffe, Lucid Slashes Guidance, Honda-Sony Team Up, Nio Headed To Hong Kong And More
summary: The EV space was swathed in a sea of red in the week ending March 4, although market leader Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA) and a handful of stocks managed to buck the downtrend. The negative sentiment can be traced back to company-specific catalysts, which pressured stocks.
